scripts.minify:js: npx terser public/platform.js -o public/platform.min.js -c drop_console=true,drop_debugger=true -m && npx terser public/widget.js -o public/widget.min.js -c drop_console=true,drop_debugger=true -m
scripts.minify: npm run minify:js && npm run minify:css
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run minify
